content.en_text: Section 1.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一名男子先和健康中心的接待员交谈，然后和医生交谈。
content.en_text: You will hear a man talking first to a receptionist and then to a doctor at a health centre.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第2页第1至第3题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 1 to 3 on page 2.

content.cn_text: 你会看到已经为你完成了一个例题。
content.en_text: You will see that there is an example that has been done for you.

content.cn_text: 只有这一次，与例题相关的对话会先播放。
content.en_text: On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：早上好，有什么可以帮您？
content.en_text: Receptionist: Good morning, how can I help you?

content.cn_text: Patient：你好，我是来这个地区的游客。
content.en_text: Patient: Yes, I am a visitor to this area.

content.cn_text: 我前段时间发生了一次运动事故，现在还有些疼痛，所以想问问
content.en_text: I had a sporting accident a little while ago and I am still in some pain and I wondered

content.cn_text: 我能不能在这里看医生。
content.en_text: if I could see a doctor here.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：当然可以，先生。我们可以把您登记为临时病人。
content.en_text: Receptionist: Certainly sir, we can take you on as a temporary patient.

content.cn_text: 我先记录一些个人信息。
content.en_text: I will just take down some personal details.

content.cn_text: 可以先告诉我您的姓名吗？
content.en_text: Can I start with your name?
Patient: Yes, it is Peter.
Peter Smith. Peter Smith。

content.cn_text: 病人的姓名是 Peter Smith。
content.en_text: The patient's name is Peter Smith.

content.cn_text: 所以空格中已经填入 Peter Smith。
content.en_text: So Peter Smith has been written in the space.
Now we shall begin.

content.cn_text: 你需要边听边答题，因为录音不会
content.en_text: You should answer the questions as you listen because you will not hear the recording
a second time.

content.cn_text: 请仔细听，并回答第1至第3题。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 3.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：早上好，有什么可以帮您？
content.en_text: Receptionist: Good morning, how can I help you?

content.cn_text: Patient：你好，我是来这个地区的游客。
content.en_text: Patient: Yes, I am a visitor to this area.

content.cn_text: 我前段时间发生了一次运动事故，现在还有些疼痛，所以想问问
content.en_text: I had a sporting accident a little while ago and I am still in some pain and I wondered

content.cn_text: 我能不能在这里看医生。
content.en_text: if I could see a doctor here.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：当然可以，先生。我们可以把您登记为临时病人。
content.en_text: Receptionist: Certainly sir, we can take you on as a temporary patient.

content.cn_text: 我先记录一些个人信息。
content.en_text: I will just take down some personal details.

content.cn_text: 可以先告诉我您的姓名吗？
content.en_text: Can I start with your name?
Patient: Yes, it is Peter.
Peter Smith. Peter Smith。
Receptionist: Right, Peter.
And where are you staying here?
Patient: At 95 Cross Street.
Receptionist: And the suburb?
Patient: Walkley, that is W-A-L-K-L-E-Y.

content.cn_text: Receptionist：可以给我一个联系电话吗？
content.en_text: Receptionist: And can I have a contact phone number?
Patient: It is 4689-5324.
Receptionist: Thanks.
Okay.

content.cn_text: 请您在那边稍等，医生马上会见您。
content.en_text: If you just wait down there, the doctor will see you in a minute.

content.cn_text: 在听剩余对话之前，你有一些时间浏览第4题
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 4
to 10 on page 2.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第4至第10题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 4 to 10.

content.cn_text: Doctor：现在我能为您做些什么？
content.en_text: Doctor: Now what can I do for you?
It is Peter Smith, isn't it?

content.cn_text: Patient：是的。我发生过一次运动事故，已经由家里的医生治疗过，但现在仍然疼。
content.en_text: Patient: Yes, I had a sporting accident and was treated by a doctor at home but I am still in pain.

content.cn_text: Doctor：好的，我首先需要问您几个问题。
content.en_text: Doctor: Right, I just need to ask you a few questions first of all.
Patient: Fine.
Doctor: Now, what sport were you doing?
Patient: I was playing tennis.
Doctor: Oh, I see.
And what was the nature of your injury?

content.cn_text: 是伤到了肘部或手腕吗？
content.en_text: Did you hurt your elbow or wrist?
Patient: No, I had a sprained knee.
That was the original problem.
Doctor: Right.

content.cn_text: 这是在什么时候发生的？
content.en_text: And when did this happen?
Patient: It was three weeks ago now.
So that was June 18th.
Doctor: Fine.
And you say you had medical treatment?
Patient: Yes.

content.cn_text: 医生说我不需要拍X光之类的，只让我用冰袋。
content.en_text: The doctor said I didn't need an x-ray or anything and he just told me to use an ice pack.
Doctor: Fine.

content.cn_text: Patient：是的，而且我一直在用一根手杖帮助走动。
content.en_text: Patient: Yes, and I've been using a walking stick to help me get around.
Doctor: Right.
Now, what problems are you experiencing at the moment?
Are you having any problems walking?

content.cn_text: Patient：嗯，我走路还可以，但我还是不能上楼，所以一直睡在楼下。
content.en_text: Patient: Well, I can walk okay but I still can't go upstairs so I've been sleeping downstairs.
Doctor: Hmm.
Now, you say your knee still hurts?
Patient: Well, no.
Actually, it's recovering nicely.
It's my back that's hurting me now.

content.cn_text: 晚上疼得厉害，我几乎睡不着。
content.en_text: It really aches at night and I can hardly sleep.

content.cn_text: Doctor：针对这个问题，我可以给您一些不同建议。
content.en_text: Doctor: Well, there's a few different things I can suggest for that.
Patient: Great.

content.cn_text: Doctor：首先，您应该停止使用手杖，因为它可能就是问题的来源。
content.en_text: Doctor: First, you should put your stick away as that's probably the source of the problem.
It'll be making you unbalanced.
Patient: Oh, really?
I wish I'd known.

content.cn_text: Doctor：之后，我可以给您开一些放松背部肌肉的药。
content.en_text: Doctor: After that, I can prescribe you something to relax the muscles in your back.

content.cn_text: Patient：哦，不好意思麻烦您，但我以前吃过类似的药，而且有
content.en_text: Patient: Oh, sorry to be difficult but I've had something like that in the past and there were

content.cn_text: 很多副作用，所以我不得不停药。
content.en_text: lots of side effects and I had to stop taking it.
Can you recommend anything else?

content.cn_text: Doctor：可以，我们有一张传单，上面有一些你可以在家做的练习，可以帮助恢复。
content.en_text: Doctor: Well, yes, we do have a leaflet showing some exercises you can do to help yourself at
home.

content.cn_text: 如果你每天做，很快就会有效果。
content.en_text: If you do them every day, they'll soon be effective.
Patient: Great.
I'll do that.
That is the end of section one.

content.cn_text: 你现在有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You now have half a minute to check your answers.
All right.
Thank you.

groups.desc:
Complete the form below.
Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Question 1–10

items.title: Street address: 1. ____________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 Street address，原文直接回答 at 95 Cross Street，所以答案是 95 Cross Street。

items.title: Suburb: 2. ____________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Suburb，原文拼写出 Walkley，所以答案是 Walkley。

items.title: Phone number: 3. ____________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 Phone number，原文给出 4689-5324，答案可写为 46895324。

items.title: Type of injury: Sprained 4. ____________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 Type of injury: Sprained ______，原文说 sprained knee。elbow 和 wrist 是医生猜测的干扰。

items.title: Date of injury: 5. ____________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 Date of injury，原文给出 June 18th，所以答案可写 June 18 / 18 June 等。

items.title: The patient’s own doctor advised treatment with 6. ____________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 previous treatment 是 advised treatment with ______，原文说 use an ice pack。x-ray 是不需要做的检查。

items.title: The patient is unable to 7. ____________ and he is experiencing pain in his 8. ____________ at night, which is affecting his sleep.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 The patient is unable to ______，原文说 can't go upstairs，所以答案是 go upstairs。walking 是医生的问题，不是答案。

items.title: The patient is unable to 7. ____________ and he is experiencing pain in his 8. ____________ at night, which is affecting his sleep.
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问晚上疼痛部位 affecting his sleep，原文说 it's my back that's hurting me now，并且晚上疼影响睡眠。knee 是医生确认时的干扰。

items.title: Stop using the 9. ____________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 Stop using the ______，原文说 put your stick away，所以答案是 stick。

items.title: Do regular 10. ____________ at home
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 Do regular ______ at home，原文说 some exercises you can do at home，并建议每天做。药物因副作用被拒绝，是干扰。

groups.source_collect:

Details of injury
Sport: Tennis
Type of injury: Sprained $4$
Date of injury: $5$
Previous treatment and current problems
• The patient’s own doctor advised treatment with $6$
• The patient is unable to $7$ and he is experiencing pain in his $8$ at night, which is affecting his sleep.
Advice given
• Stop using the $9$
• Do regular $10$ at home
